query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='logfilsiz'
description_zh: 主日志文件大小（4KB 页）应 >= 1000（约 4MB），过小会增加日志切换开销
description_en: Primary log file size (4KB pages) should be >= 1000 (~4MB)

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='logprimary'
description_zh: 主日志文件个数应 >= 10，避免频繁分配辅助日志
description_en: Number of primary log files should be >= 10

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='logbufsz'
description_zh: 日志缓冲区（4KB 页）应 >= 256，提升提交性能

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='sortheap'
description_zh: 排序堆（4KB 页）应 >= 256，避免排序溢出到磁盘

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='locklist'
description_zh: 锁列表内存（4KB 页）应 >= 4096，减少锁升级与锁等待
description_en: Lock list memory (4KB pages) should be >= 4096

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='maxlocks'
description_zh: 应用程序持锁占锁列表百分比应 >= 10，降低锁升级频率

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='num_iocleaners'
description_zh: 异步 IO 清理器数量应 >= 1，及时将脏页写盘
description_en: Number of asynchronous IO cleaners should be >= 1

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='dlchktime'
description_zh: 死锁检测时间间隔（毫秒）应 >= 1000，设置为 0 将关闭死锁检测
description_en: Deadlock check time (ms) should be >= 1000; 0 disables deadlock detection

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='chngpgs_thresh'
description_zh: 页清理阈值应 >= 30%，过低的阈值会增加脏页扫描开销

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='logarchmeth1'
description_zh: 应开启归档日志（LOGARCHMETH1 != OFF），否则无法做 PITR 恢复
description_en: Archive logging should be enabled (LOGARCHMETH1 != OFF) for PITR

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='trackmod'
description_zh: 应启用增量备份跟踪（TRACKMOD != NO），否则无法做增量备份
description_en: Track modified pages should be enabled (TRACKMOD != NO) for incremental backup

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBCFG WHERE name='blocknonlogged'
description_zh: 应阻止非日志记录操作（BLOCKNONLOGGED != NO），保证可恢复性
description_en: Non-logged operations should be blocked (BLOCKNONLOGGED != NO)

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBMCFG WHERE name='authentication'
description_zh: 认证方式不应为 NONE（无认证），否则任意用户可登录
description_en: Authentication method must not be NONE

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBMCFG WHERE name='keepfenced'
description_zh: 应保留 fenced 进程（KEEPFENCED != NO），提升存储过程稳定性
description_en: Fenced process should be kept (KEEPFENCED != NO)

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBMCFG WHERE name='mon_act_metrics'
description_zh: 应开启活动指标监控（MON_ACT_METRICS != NONE），否则无法采集活动数据
description_en: Activity metrics monitoring should be enabled (MON_ACT_METRICS != NONE)

query_sql: SELECT value FROM SYSIBMADM.DBMCFG WHERE name='max_connections'
description_zh: 实例最大连接代理数应 >= 100
